plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP collection template for Pan Dacom CWDM/optical transmission devices (PAN-DACOM-MIB). Collects IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface counters (ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, ifXTable) rates and device uptime (sysUpTime). The source queue confirms Pan Dacom public MIB availability, but the exact raw MIB object list is not present in this worktree; without verified row-filter-free OIDs, private optical/CWDM health metrics such as link state, temperature and optical power are N/A and not faked. Applicable to Pan Dacom optical/CWDM transmission devices and other IF-MIB compliant transmission devices.
name: Transmission

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the Pan Dacom transmission device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_total_incoming_traffic
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of total bytes received by the entire device over the past 5 minutes, summed from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counters.

metrics.name: device_total_outgoing_traffic
metrics.description: This metric represents the average rate of total bytes sent by the entire device over the past 5 minutes, summed from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counters.
